query: (("weather forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat forecast"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat warning"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat alert"[Title/Abstract] OR "early warning system"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("cooling center"[Title/Abstract] OR "cooling shelter"[Title/Abstract] OR "heat relief center"[Title/Abstract]) AND ("temperature"[Title/Abstract] OR "extreme heat"[Title/Abstract]) AND "health"[Title/Abstract] AND ("intervention"[Title/Abstract] OR "causal"[Title/Abstract] OR "quasi-experimental"[Title/Abstract] OR "evaluation"[Title/Abstract]))
